notes: Candidate dry-run world for agentic workflow authoring, validation repair, scheduler/driver selection, and plan polling without touching live Automata tenants.
World dynamics would need a file-system state backend for workflow records and synthetic plan status/result progression grounded by the source-pack shapes.
Candidate dry-run world for read-only workcell/run audit tasks: find workspace context, inspect device status, page run histories, and obtain a log-export URL shape.
No workflow execution, device action, error response, hub restart, credential management, or log URL dereference is included in this source-pack boundary.
